name: Potluck Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the eggplant into 1/2-inch cubes. There should be about 1 cup of diced eggplant.
2. You can use 1/2 cup of sliced pimento stuffed olives in place of the pimento.
3. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
4. Cook the macaroni as directed on the package and drain.
5. In a Dutch oven, cook and stir the meat until browned.
6. Drain off excess fat.
7. Stir in the salt, Italian seasoning, pepper, macaroni, eggplant, sour cream, pimento, and 1 cup of cheese.
8. Turn mixture into an ungreased 3-quart casserole.
9. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
10. Bake uncovered until eggplant is tender, about 45 to 50 minutes.
11. Serve hot.
